_note: Manual inputs for the AUTO peanut engine. The board computes peanuts on its own from match data (Entry, Red card, Shock, Boredom); this file only holds the bits the data feed can't give us. Outstanding shown on the board = max(0, earned + adjust - done). Maintained via scripts/peanut.sh — you shouldn't need to hand-edit.
_missedPenaltiesNote: Keyed by ESPN player id -> how many penalties that player has missed. Each miss = +1 peanut to EVERY owner who picked that player (like motm.json, the feed has no penalty field). 45843 = Lionel Messi.
_doneNote: Keyed by person name -> how many peanuts they've physically done (drunk the tequila). Bump it by one each time someone has theirs.
_adjustNote: Keyed by person name -> manual +/- tweak for anything the rules don't cover.
